description: Semantic mapping for Oracle EBS AR tables to business concepts.

tables.description: Stores the header information for all AR transactions, including Invoices, Credit Memos, and Debit Memos.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the transaction (Primary Key).

columns.name: TRX_NUMBER
columns.description: The visible Invoice Number or Transaction Number.

columns.name: TRX_DATE
columns.description: The date the transaction was created/invoiced.

columns.name: BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID (The customer who was billed).

columns.name: CT_REFERENCE
columns.description: Customer Reference, often used for the Customer's Purchase Order (PO) Number.

columns.name: INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1
columns.description: Often used to store the Sales Order Number from Order Management.

tables.description: Stores the individual line items for each transaction.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the line (Primary Key).

columns.name: CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL (Links line to header).

columns.name: LINE_NUMBER
columns.description: The line number (1, 2, 3...).

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Description of the item or service billed.

columns.name: QUANTITY_INVOICED
columns.description: The quantity of items invoiced.

columns.name: UNIT_SELLING_PRICE
columns.description: Price per unit.

columns.name: EXTENDED_AMOUNT
columns.description: Total amount for the line (Quantity * Price).

tables.description: Tracks the outstanding balance and due dates for each transaction. Critical for determining if an invoice is 'Open' or 'Paid'.

columns.name: PAYMENT_SCHEDULE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the schedule (Primary Key).

columns.name: CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL.

columns.name: DUE_DATE
columns.description: The date payment is due.

columns.name: AMOUNT_DUE_ORIGINAL
columns.description: The original total amount of the invoice.

columns.name: AMOUNT_DUE_REMAINING
columns.description: The current outstanding balance. If 0, the invoice is fully paid.

columns.name: STATUS
columns.description: Status of the schedule (OP = Open, CL = Closed).

columns.name: CLASS
columns.description: Transaction class (INV = Invoice, CM = Credit Memo, DM = Debit Memo).

tables.description: Stores customer account details. Links the transaction to the party.

columns.name: CUST_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the customer account (Primary Key).

columns.name: ACCOUNT_NUMBER
columns.description: The unique customer account number.

columns.name: PARTY_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HZ_PARTIES (Links account to the party name).

columns.name: STATUS
columns.description: Account status (A = Active, I = Inactive).

tables.description: Stores the master party information, including names and addresses.

columns.name: PARTY_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the party (Primary Key).

columns.name: PARTY_NAME
columns.description: The name of the customer or organization.

columns.name: PARTY_NUMBER
columns.description: Unique registry ID for the party.

tables.description: Stores information about payments received from customers.

columns.name: CASH_RECEIPT_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the receipt (Primary Key).

columns.name: RECEIPT_NUMBER
columns.description: The check number or transaction reference for the payment.

columns.name: RECEIPT_DATE
columns.description: The date the payment was received.

columns.name: AMOUNT
columns.description: The amount of the payment.

columns.name: PAY_FROM_CUSTOMER
columns.description: Foreign Key to HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS (The customer who paid).

columns.name: STATUS
columns.description: Status of the receipt (APP = Applied, UNAPP = Unapplied).

common_joins.description: Link Invoice Header to Customer Name

example_queries.description: Get all open invoices with customer names and outstanding balances.
example_queries.sql: SELECT t.TRX_NUMBER, p.PARTY_NAME, s.AMOUNT_DUE_REMAINING FROM RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL t JOIN HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS a ON t.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID = a.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID JOIN HZ_PARTIES p ON a.PARTY_ID = p.PARTY_ID JOIN AR_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES_ALL s ON t.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = s.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID WHERE s.STATUS = 'OP'

example_queries.description: Get all payments received in the last month with customer names.
example_queries.sql: SELECT r.RECEIPT_NUMBER, r.RECEIPT_DATE, r.AMOUNT, p.PARTY_NAME FROM AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL r JOIN HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS a ON r.PAY_FROM_CUSTOMER = a.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID JOIN HZ_PARTIES p ON a.PARTY_ID = p.PARTY_ID WHERE r.RECEIPT_DATE >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1)
